title: phyllanthus axillaris
intro: Phyllanthus axillaris is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as a flowering shrub native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus axillaris include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support liver health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus axillaris include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
